description: The Netmiko integration currently only supports the netmiko-cmds command for SSH. This command can be used via the XSOAR CLI, as part of an automation, or as a task in an XSOAR playbook. Like other XSOAR commands, this object can be passed a single command, a list of commands, or an array of commands to execute in a single session.
examples:
Command Example (Single command)
#
!netmiko-cmds cmds="whoami"
Context Example
#
{
"Command": "whoami",
"DateTimeUTC": "2023-04-24T21:40:21.755985",

Command Example (Multiple commands)
#
As multiple commands via CLI or task
#
!netmiko-cmds cmds="whoami
who"
As multiple commands via CLI or task using an array
#

!netmiko-cmds cmds="whoami
who"
As multiple commands via CLI or task using an array
#
array context key = ["whoami", "who"]
!netmiko-cmds cmds=${array}
Context Example
#

Command Example (Multiple commands)
Docs
Developer Docs

Social
Blog
